overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt walking along a forest trail at night. The clip depicts a continuous journey through dense woodland transitioning to more open meadow areas with wooden fencing, characterized by atmospheric blue moonlight and detailed natural environments.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path with swords on his back, moving through dense woodland

entered.detail: Dense cluster of tall pine trees lining the left side of the path
Winding dirt trail through the forest with visible wheel ruts
Green grass and undergrowth covering the forest floor
Large moss-covered rock formation beside the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail through dense pine forest at night. Tall trees line both sides of the path, with grass and undergrowth covering the forest floor. The scene is illuminated by moonlight filtering through the canopy, creating a cool blue atmosphere.

events.description: wooden fence structures appear on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking along the path, passing wooden fence structures on the right

entered.detail: Rustic wooden fence posts and rails lining the right side of the path
Open grassy meadow visible beyond the fence on the right
Bush with yellow flowers growing beside the wooden fence
Simple wooden gate structure blocking a side path

segments.scene_description: The path continues through the forest with wooden fence structures appearing on the right side. An open meadow is visible beyond the fencing. Geralt walks past flowering shrubs and a wooden gate, with the right side tree line receding to reveal more open landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow trail with scattered trees

events.description: path opens into more open meadow area with scattered trees and flowering vegetation

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the more open trail section, passing flowering bushes and scattered trees

entered.detail: Dark silhouette of distant forest on the horizon
Small rock formation beside the path

segments.scene_description: The trail opens into a wider meadow area with scattered trees and more visible sky overhead. Geralt passes white flowering bushes on the right as the wooden fencing falls behind. The path continues toward a distant tree line under the dark night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense pine forest that gradually opens into a wide, moonlit meadow. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt trail flanked by towering trees and thick undergrowth, all bathed in a cool blue moonlight filtering through the canopy. As the path continues, the dense tree line on the right begins to recede, revealing wooden fence structures and flowering shrubs that hint at a more open landscape. The scene then expands as Geralt passes through a wooden gate, leaving the enclosure behind to enter a spacious meadow with scattered trees and a broader view of the dark night sky. Finally, the trail leads further into the open terrain, passing white flowering bushes as the camera moves toward a distant tree line.
